Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Daniel Martinez de la Vega, Esq. appeared with petitioner Loble Lau, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the mionr Roger Lau.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $10,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $861.75.

The net balance of $6,638.25 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, located at 500 Battery Street, San Francisco, CA. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
